## Acceptance Criteria

The PR will be merged when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] TypeScript checks pass (`npm run typecheck`)
